non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order 
pharmacy within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this 
field; reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_MONPP_COPAY_1M).
